catering
Only Fresh Ingredients
Kimchi Red creates Korean food and Korean Fried Chicken with bold amazing flavors at grab-and-go speed.
catering
Kimchi Red
Korean dining experience
At Kimchi Red, we are committed to providing customers an enjoyable Korean dining experience, serving the finest quality meals. Our foundation is based on healthy eating with low-calorie, low-carb, and high-protein options.
Our main goal is to provide the most delicious and healthiest premium Fried chicken, Rice plates, Tacos, etc… We use only the highest quality ingredients like fresh, never frozen chicken, marinated steak, pork, and Market Fresh vegetables.
Here at Kimchi Red, we’ve created the perfect balance of delicious and nutritious Korean food on-the-go.
Reviews
Review by - Yelp
Jaewoo L:
Two thumbs up  !..Excellent service and No 1 tasty fried Korean chicken. ! Definitely,  I will come back!
Review by - Yelp
Jonathan M:
The food was absolutely amazing! The service was quick too! I can't wait to go back and try the other fried chicken options!
Review by - Yelp
Ahmad W:
Omg  is all I could say when I bit into the chicken. It's crispy crispy crispy crunchy and juicy! I was hoping that I made it home to try it with the yum yum sauce . Delicious is the word! 11 alive and CBS News labeled this restaurant..
Review by - Yelp
Amna C:
I definitely enjoyed my experience at Kimchi Red. After finding out they serve halal chicken, my husband and I decided to check it out. We ordered the spicy jeonju chicken and the kimchi fried rice. The portions are quite large..

Kimchi Red - Food Menu
Our Menu
Alpharetta menu
Johns Creek Menu
Forum Menu
Vegetarian (V) | ⚠️Allergen notice: Be advised that the sauces and batter mix for all our fried dishes may contain wheat, soy beans and nuts | *Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs, may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.
Korean Fried Chicken
Choose from: Original | Wings +$2.00 | Boneless +$2.00
Kimchi
$37.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. K-fried chicken topped in a Kimchi & onion stir-fry sauce drizzled with spicy mayo. Serves 2
Rose Chon
$34.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. Crispy fried chicken topped in KR’s exceptional creamy tomato Alfredo sauce. Super delicious. Serves 2 | ⚠️Allergen notice - cashew nuts.
K - Crispy
$28.99/+
Half  $15.99 | Whole $28.99 • Add +$1.99/each: Yang Yum, Soy Garlic Sauce
Honey Butter Pepper
$29.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. K-fried chicken tossed in a creamy butter sweet sauce, with diced jalapenos. Serves 2
Snow Cheese
$29.99/+
K-fried chicken coated in a sweet garlic, onion cheese powder. Serves 2
Kang - Nam
$32.99/+
K-fried chicken topped with fresh sauteed onions in a refreshing yogurt sauce, sprinkled with parsley and red seasoning. Serves 2
Spicy Jeonju
$29.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. Super crispy fried chicken tossed in a mild sweet tangysoy sauce with red pepper oil. Serves 2
Mal - La
$34.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. Addicting, tingly and spicy flavor explosion in your mouth, tossed in our special Schizuan sauce, garnished with peppercorns & cilantro. Serves 2
Soy Garlic Pepper
$29.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. Korean fried chicken glazed in our sweet garlic soy sauce. Sprinkled with Thai chili pepper. Serves 2
Chef Secret
$29.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. K-fried chicken smothered in a sticky, spicy and sweet red Gochujang sauce. Serves 2
Cheesy Buldak
$34.99/+
Mild, Medium or Hot. Stringy mozzarella "buldak" cheese poured over crispy, K-fried chicken with shots of "Buldak" sauce.
Red Buldak
$34.99/+
Hot or X Spicy. Mukbang crave! Cheesy, creamy, spicy Buldak ramen served on a bed of crispy fried chicken, topped off with an egg. Pop! the yolk and enjoy. Serves 2 ⚠️Allergen notice
Kimchi Red Plates
Include: White steam rice, japchae and kimchi | Extra Spicy Pork +$2.99 | Beef +$3.99
1. KR Galbi
$29.99/+
Regular $29.99 | Premium $39.99 • Angus beef short ribs is marinated in a mild sweet, soy mixture and grilled to perfection.
2. Bulgogi Plate
$15.99
Thin slices of beef marinated in sweet-soy  special sauce.
3. Tofu Plate
$16.99
Available Monday-Thursday • Pan fried tofu is served with tangy stir-fried kimchi and garnished with green onions.
4. Japchae Plate
$13.99/+
Japchae Only $13.99 | Japchae Plate $14.99 • Sweet dish of stir-fried clear glass noodles with vegetables.
5. Skirt Steak Reg.
$29.99
Regular. Halal skirt steak short ribs is marinated in a mild sweet, soy mixture and grilled.
6. BBQ Jeyuk
$13.99
Char-grilled spicy marinated pork.
7. Fried Chicken Plate
$14.99
